overall.description: GTA V gameplay footage showing a rainy overpass scene. The player first observes highway traffic from an elevated position, then walks along the overpass sidewalk. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with wet surfaces reflecting the dim morning light.

agents.ego_description: standing on overpass observing traffic flow on the multi-lane highway below

entered.detail: tall concrete wall forming the edge of the overpass structure
elevated highway bridge crossing perpendicular to the road below
large illuminated billboard displaying purple and white content above the highway
tall electrical pylons visible in the hazy background
orange traffic barrels arranged in the center lanes of the highway

segments.scene_description: Stationary view from an elevated overpass overlooking a multi-lane highway. Vehicles travel in both directions on the wet asphalt below, navigating around orange construction barrels. A concrete retaining wall stands on the right while a digital billboard and power pylons are visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: overpass sidewalk with palm tree lining

events.description: camera turns left and begins walking forward along the overpass sidewalk
transition from highway overlook to walking along tree-lined overpass sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the overpass sidewalk next to palm trees

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the adjacent road

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk
yellow metal guardrail separating the sidewalk from the highway drop
tall street lamps with illuminated lights along the sidewalk
large billboard structure visible alongside the adjacent road
wooden telephone poles with power lines running along the road
dark tunnel entrance visible at the end of the road ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk of the overpass, with palm trees lining the left side and a metal guardrail separating from the highway below. Street lamps illuminate the wet pavement as the camera approaches a tunnel entrance in the distance, with occasional vehicles passing on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a stationary observation of a rainy highway into a first-person walk along a moody urban overpass. It begins with a high-angle view overlooking multi-lane wet asphalt where vehicles navigate around orange construction barrels beneath a hazy sky filled with power pylons and a distant digital billboard. As the camera shifts from this vantage point, it begins moving forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing under street lamps that reflect off the damp pavement. The scene then expands to reveal a line of palm trees on the left and a metal guardrail on the right, separating the pedestrian path from the flowing traffic. Finally, the camera continues its steady progression toward a looming tunnel entrance in the distance.
